kept.title: ChopChop: A Programmable Framework for Semantically Constraining the Output of Language Models.
kept.reason: LLM constrained decoding for semantic program properties (type safety, equivalence) via realizability analysis

kept.title: Fuzzing Guided by Bayesian Program Analysis.
kept.reason: Integrates Bayesian program analysis (PL) with fuzzing, using ML for target prioritization and adaptive guidance.
